instruction: Describe how the vulnerability could be triggered.
input: Azure uAMQP is a general purpose C library for AMQP 1.0. The UAMQP library is used by several clients to implement AMQP protocol communication.  When clients using this library receive a crafted binary type data, an integer overflow or wraparound or memory safety issue can occur and may cause remote code execution.  This vulnerability has been patched in release 2024-01-01.
output: The vulnerability can be triggered when a client using the Azure uAMQP library receives specially crafted binary data, causing an integer overflow or memory safety issue.
